scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run evals
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @teampitch/ui lint && bun run --filter @teampitch/worker lint && bun run --filter @teampitch/evals lint
scripts.lint:health: oxlint apps/worker/src packages/evals/src packages/ui/src/lib --type-aware --deny-warnings -A typescript/await-thenable -A typescript/require-await -A typescript/restrict-template-expressions -A typescript/unbound-method
scripts.health:report: mkdir -p artifacts/fallow && fallow --format markdown --output-file artifacts/fallow/health.md || true && fallow --format json --output-file artifacts/fallow/health.json || true && fallow --format sarif --output-file artifacts/fallow/health.sarif || true
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run --filter @teampitch/ui check && bun run --filter @teampitch/worker check && bun run --filter @teampitch/evals check
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run lint:health && bun run doctor:check && bun run audit
